entries.gt_7964bf4ac54bd0: If the orderly asks for a coupon, say the blood got in line.
entries.gt_79da9142e755a7: The test tube is cloudy. Do not lick your hands after it.
entries.gt_7a641acd93798b: There is another fight at water distribution today. I am not going there without witnesses.
entries.gt_7a876fd6a8d6b4: If the hazmat cabinet opened without clearance, better close the shift without argument.
entries.gt_7a9575a17412ea: If the storekeeper says "norm", the stomach will be doing the bargaining.
entries.gt_7aab80ad40731e: The lab chief went to get the commission and left us with a jar that must not be opened.
entries.gt_7aba37c8ba82f9: Get the child away, I am holding on!
entries.gt_7cf965ede419ad: The queue for the radiator is short if you come before the siren.
entries.gt_7d5feca10f56eb: The sensor clicks without a sample. We will log it as a threat.
entries.gt_7e4b320b0e3a69: Too quiet. Either they took everyone away, or the ledger has not arrived yet.
entries.gt_7e84407772a87e: The pencil broke on the lift.
entries.gt_7f021c90b7272c: The field kit is dry only on the outside.
entries.gt_7f52b14c0d9cfe: Something is missing from the shared cupboard, and everyone suddenly remembered your face.
entries.gt_7f57d9ec367060: A lathe operator sees defects by the shavings. If the shavings come in a blue spiral, the shift is closed.
entries.gt_801c680b00a718: Save the cartridge, food on the floor!
entries.gt_8021b213016174: After samosbor, someone else's door may open onto your corridor. Check the number.
entries.gt_806e20b27d48cb: To the door together, no pushing!
entries.gt_80a0fcb7f96c85: The folder is thin, the trouble is thick.
entries.gt_81515c321407fe: Coupon, bucket, no water. The most ordinary set.
entries.gt_8364d0f94477f5: The warehouse does not empty itself. Every empty shelf has a surname in the ledger.
entries.gt_83c1fe5d66b86f: If production stops, tomorrow they raise prices on food, filters, and gaskets.
entries.gt_84ff3f769bc9b9: Do not open it, even if it calls!
entries.gt_858ebdbd11dcd7: Do not stand in a puddle under a blinking lamp. That is how people get written off here without a form.
entries.gt_85ad9e843dede0: I have a map, but the kitchen is gone.
entries.gt_85cd50b75dd319: Concentrate to the window, spoons in place!
entries.gt_85ef094fe13296: Hold the door and do not touch the handle.
entries.gt_8762bdf3ab1c67: The data is beeping. I believe it.
entries.gt_87dcfa9ea4d6a3: If there is a dry gasket in the cabinet, do not wet it with your hands or excuses.
entries.gt_882c71a423ef4b: After a lift like that, touch the buttons with a sleeve, not fingers.
entries.gt_88be21dbda50f1: The thread on my wrist has gone damp.
entries.gt_88ed1b938c5cc3: The patrols came through hard. Better know whose sector this is now.
entries.gt_89969958a94882: Their help is quiet: first they give bread, then they ask who sleeps nearby.
entries.gt_8a032e5a45ed03: After a fight, the wild ones quickly understand what is poorly guarded.
entries.gt_8aa74daee3a24e: The lab assistant touches the box first, so the professor writes the thanks first, after the fact.
entries.gt_8b15ee050535d5: Lower your voice, they listen at the door!
entries.gt_8b99233fe064a4: You took a system assignment - they already know you at the window and at the post.
entries.gt_8c3f238a7a16f8: I slice soap thin, like bread.
entries.gt_8d44b9153718e9: Check the magazine before the door. After the door, they check nerves.
entries.gt_8d5bfcc01bbe81: The ink ran out before patience did.
entries.gt_8d88698757ba5a: After a dead monster, always check that it was alone.
entries.gt_8e042a48382dc5: If the pipes start counting steps, the conversation is short: map, door, inside.
entries.gt_8f738cc001a2b7: Do not say the old names!
entries.gt_9084ece0378783: The missing list does not get shorter. They just write the surnames smaller.
entries.gt_91c36e571e1829: On an empty stomach, the queue seems shorter and the fight closer.
entries.gt_9222fdc6eaae69: There is concrete dust in my mouth and the taste of an old riser. Need water.
entries.gt_929c9fe05fbb8c: The warehouse empties faster than the shift.
entries.gt_9315a4cd9a4859: I saw how you held the door. So now I am speaking plainly.
entries.gt_93e0bd2333ac34: There is a new scratch on the shared cupboard.
entries.gt_949b92d1c8e4b7: The lab chief likes the word standard. Usually he says it from behind glass.
entries.gt_949f9bd09acde6: Do not touch the bucket by the door. That is not water, that is someone else's shift.
entries.gt_94f3c123eec2a6: The priest here is more a candle guard than a parish chief.
entries.gt_969a57a4d614f0: The siren started. Close the door.
entries.gt_96a91179490a05: Where factions made noise, trophies, witnesses, and debts remain.
entries.gt_96a9743383eb2f: I take the short way only when I know the long exit.
entries.gt_971be2de4ca06d: The house committee does not shout right away. First it writes down who stood closer to the crate.
entries.gt_978aafaa85c4ee: A monster was killed recently. That means the cartridges are gone and the smell remains.
entries.gt_97ca42b9358461: Now I even close an empty cabinet. Later they will say there was a filter in it.
entries.gt_989ef893b9dcfd: If a sample moves in front of management, the sample set is already spoiled.
entries.gt_98a9f1477a4a5f: This door held us; now you hold the bolt!
entries.gt_98b49785106c2f: The mark by the jamb is small, but our own see it.
entries.gt_98e02cd503f377: The ladle struck empty. Bad sound.
entries.gt_9959e2552daee0: Cultists call a skirmish a sign. Everyone else calls it a problem.
entries.gt_99e6dea70739d1: The soup today saw only the ladle.
entries.gt_9a421bba8fc9e5: Hear that? The shop spat another batch into the crate.
entries.gt_9b365585b9852c: It is quiet at the door today. Means it is holding.
entries.gt_9b609a289b57d5: The machine is quiet only before it grabs a sleeve.
entries.gt_9c93971b790821: If the lift smells of the previous shift, keep the diagram in your hand, not in your bag.
entries.gt_9f3ae80fd2f7a7: The machines produce goods more slowly than the queue takes them apart.
entries.gt_9fc051916210df: The new guy asked where the stop button was. They showed him the injury log.
entries.gt_9fd6300d67a233: The concentrate press works honestly: it takes raw material, gives rumors and belyak.
entries.gt_a0f9fe23d516b1: The wild ones have a simple rule: do not look in the sack unless you are ready to pay.
entries.gt_a18ebe9bdd15af: We will rinse the wound. Leave pride in the queue; it is not sterile.
entries.gt_a269d1fd619bca: After a skirmish, foreign colors are noticed faster than blood.
entries.gt_a3d0b83cd939ee: I do not like this sector. Lots of corners, usually fewer cartridges.
entries.gt_a4605822ca807c: Pulse is jumping, do not argue!
entries.gt_a5fe6c1ab1d204: Around here we ask people like you first: whose coupon, and who saw it.
entries.gt_a629103d628f2f: Drag him to our own, do not call the old name!
entries.gt_a631e4e4eb0fd5: Observation is worth more than panic, until panic is faster.
entries.gt_a78854d8e3d340: Iodine at the bottom, patients at the door.
entries.gt_a84f4d4b1d01d8: Do not touch the bread on the radiator. It was left for the one who comes back alone.
entries.gt_a95e046f450d6e: After a theft, they recognize you faster than you think.
entries.gt_a96a886b21a621: The shift master said to start it. The mechanic heard: bury the shaft later.
entries.gt_a9ac727402d107: The sample must not hear the shift surnames. It is calmer that way for everyone standing by the box.
entries.gt_aa7c6461717fb9: A candle smokes less if people do not argue nearby.
entries.gt_aa8872d71bf818: Do not ask the composition. On a full stomach there are fewer questions.
entries.gt_aa89f30c66a3c8: The key turns hard, so it is alive.
entries.gt_aab8ab2c8d3616: Rag in the crack, eyes down!
entries.gt_ab038cc44e2d98: When the Beast falls, the hunter listens to the corridor first, not climbs for the trophy.
entries.gt_ab4d4db7bd93b2: The lift lied by a floor. I walked.
entries.gt_ac014b9eb37afc: Do not finish him off, there will be a trade!
entries.gt_ace3974ae046a7: The briquette line has four colors of norm, but the ledger recognizes only weight.
entries.gt_ad4210dab6e7a0: The line is running smoothly today. That is not a good sign; the shift just has not ended yet.
entries.gt_ae53d243b25dcc: While the hermodoor is ours, the section elder counts people, not the guilty.
entries.gt_ae88cc34f2ff95: No need to count rations aloud.
entries.gt_aebcf7360595ce: If the batch is warm, do not be glad. A good batch cools, a bad one smells.
entries.gt_aee95d658d543a: Not by the kitchen, step away!
entries.gt_af46bad4fbe93c: If the press gave an even batch, the cooks immediately pretend the composition is known.
entries.gt_af4dff89a59470: The phase is jumping. Do not touch the lamp.
entries.gt_af5194c7fb8f72: A PSI burn goes in the ledger as tool contact. The hand disagrees.
entries.gt_b01dda3bcfa92e: In the Void, the lift arrives with someone else's floor number and a wet handrail.
entries.gt_b02c12a28cdfab: Whoever took from the common stock then explains not to me, but to the queue.
entries.gt_b06260d720cce8: I will borrow with bread and repay with rumor.
entries.gt_b3707f69c5a093: Need the skull intact, hit the body!
entries.gt_b3ac1f8de2de3c: The sergeant said silence - we are silent!
entries.gt_b4b2fa75f790ee: In your own sector people shout quieter: later everyone still has to stand together by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_b4bb9bf6bc6e53: When water is short, the defective batch sticks to the tray and pretends it is food.
entries.gt_b59f9f55125a93: The same trace repeats on the wall. This is no longer an accident, it is a sample.
entries.gt_b5c49f7fed124f: Fine. I will say more than I should.
entries.gt_b5f900de0f1020: The canister is empty, but it is mine.
entries.gt_b610248961a05d: The spoons will be returned before all-clear.
entries.gt_b615d2b4d140f8: No relay - the lamp blinks, and by the panel they are already writing down the guilty one.
entries.gt_b61b7b03106b3a: Medic here, if the medic is still alive!
entries.gt_b69e596aab2487: Without gaskets, repair turns into a bucket under a leak.
entries.gt_b87a849254c537: The old name was left on the list. I am not writing the new one yet.
entries.gt_b8ff97b46ef16a: Morphine without a record turns pain into debt.
entries.gt_b9dbcf0aeef4ee: The shavings are blue. Cool it.
entries.gt_ba3bdb4e9632ff: The door is holding? Tell me it is holding.
entries.gt_bb032824b3c1ba: The pipe knocks evenly - we work. It knocks in jerks - close the valve and call the fitter.
entries.gt_bb45283731fc44: After a skirmish, liquidators clear the passage first, then ask the surname.
entries.gt_bcca1ec2104d13: If you bring a bandage one more time, the orderly will stop pretending she does not know you.
entries.gt_bd6499e7992474: Do not drop the bucket. If you spill it, you will not prove there was only one.
entries.gt_bd94e2b66d1a46: Norm likes even metal and crooked explanations.
entries.gt_bda433c065c49e: An extra kilogram of loot often weighs exactly one life.
entries.gt_be9b105c058d46: An order does not heal trembling, but it shortens the route to the exit.
entries.gt_bf1511bb710b95: Change the rubber before the siren, not after.
entries.gt_bf7a0a78ff74ba: Bring water, metal, or labor - the machine does not eat by itself.
entries.gt_bf900229bf566f: All-clear by the board, not by the voice!
entries.gt_c0871062b52640: They talk about your help without whispering.
entries.gt_c114f9cd8fa1e1: Do not approach our shelves without witnesses.
entries.gt_c1a3f04ea17a8d: The filter is dry. Concrete in the mouth.
entries.gt_c1feb869cf2f0e: The casualty log does not record fatigue. It records sector and time.
entries.gt_c331cf08a9434d: Do not be afraid. We will just stand nearby while the fog goes through the corridor.
entries.gt_c3738b2fd916af: If the master at the panel is swearing with ordinary words, the phase is still in place.
entries.gt_792340831c99ec: Civilian corridors, living, office, and common rooms.
entries.gt_799c57558b1654: A seam hunter that makes the wall a bad place for melee.
entries.gt_7a68980dc5d3ee: In water it gains armor, regeneration, and tempo; on dry concrete it loses protection, slows down, and leaves a short wet trail.
entries.gt_7a7c7e54814817: The lamp hums like a tooth, ozone hangs in the passage, the silhouette stays by the light.
entries.gt_7b1ce6cc0a2c93: Dark corridors, door turns, office and apartment bends of the Ministry, Living Zone, and rare void routes.
entries.gt_7bc2c09b9791bf: The first dark dash places an afterimage anchor; if the target moves toward it in darkness, the second tempo strikes from the side, while light or standing still breaks the trap.
entries.gt_7bf3202120af56: A wet service predator that makes the trough a route choice, not flat water.
entries.gt_7c7dbec29b3c51: fatty chitin, unsigned order, rare quarantine card from the collar
entries.gt_7d30913837a7d5: Old black greatcoats march in formation, mask numbers do not match, red lenses blink unlike the living.
entries.gt_7d5adbe264ef2c: Walls do not hold contact; changing position, distance, and UV-disrupted tempo save you.
entries.gt_7e5372fa900483: white plate, black joint pin, rare refusal circuit board
entries.gt_7efd4b88b1d6eb: Corridor plant blockade: burns skin, confuses the map with seeds, and presses weak seams with roots.
entries.gt_7f6946cbbf5ec5: The silhouette tightens in a dark corner, the shadow remains after the body, the air grows cold.
entries.gt_811c98ead26ce8: Rare pressure where the right choice is a short burst or immediate departure.
entries.gt_829a62f76b1cc2: Drop extra notes, forms, and keys into a box: with a paper smell, the Stamp-Eater scents farther, and around corners it loses the trail.
entries.gt_829a9a7832e434: moldy fringe, spore print, filtering layer from old lining
entries.gt_8308a63fdca76a: Death by Pseudolift should read as entering a strange cabin without inspection, bait, or retreat from the vestibule.
entries.gt_8308e505b0a8ec: Step off the wet straight line before the flash: the automaton does not track a dry flank, and after the shot it cools down long enough for point blank or a bypass.
entries.gt_83732732877ec5: Do not chase the Thin Shadow: stand still, make noise, or turn on light. Without pursuit it loses nerve, returns, and stays weak.
entries.gt_83fc1c173814d3: Death by Unperson should read as a trusting approach without light, a witness, or a retreat route.
entries.gt_8434aff7fc74f5: Death by Crawler should read the mistake as fighting in a doorway, bathroom, water, or retreat without a straight line.
entries.gt_84733adb22d3c1: Ministry PSI predator that turns a stack of official papers into combat pressure.
entries.gt_84c2b889f36bf6: Quarantine wards, fake aid posts, post-samosbor hospital rooms, and civilian offices with a dead queue.
entries.gt_8560b074b91039: Keep a local-log warning on the first dark dash: a lit exit or standing still breaks the second tempo.
entries.gt_85759c27fe0dd7: heavy metal, twisted wire, rare usable length of rebar
entries.gt_857f91c44d9587: Do not carry a stack of forms into melee: put expensive papers in a container, throw a cheap blank as bait, and break the grip at a cabinet or table.
entries.gt_8634b099ea7f15: Keeps medium distance, spits a short web in a straight line, sidesteps on approach, and does not stack control for more than a few seconds.
entries.gt_86c0d67c9a8fc9: Exit the fog into dry air, close doors and corners, shoot safely from range, or burn only from a distance because of the gas explosion.
entries.gt_86e2854f253438: Add death-log wording for the Deadman so the mistake is social or positional, not just HP.
entries.gt_8725b683a3782d: Strikes with short roots around the center and heals from nearby patches of red mold; fire and cutting tools open the root passage faster than a full fight.
entries.gt_87f4a0a11aa6c8: Raised corner, green veins in the pile, mold fringe, and shadow under a hanging rag.
entries.gt_8826b66a9c4f83: Death by Kontorshchik should read as documents in inventory, late paper disposal, or fighting without a nearby cabinet.
entries.gt_88b9ab1a6885f4: Death by Chancery Idol should read as an open office line, papers in the pocket, and missing the window after the volley.
entries.gt_89964a6d1804af: After warning, makes one local passage through a closed door; then does not repeat the phase for a long time and weakens from an accurate shot or UV.
entries.gt_8a53ffab8ecd08: Collector storerooms, short technical passages, and weak concrete seams.
entries.gt_8ac8688cad8a4b: Black collector puddles, pump bends, wet NII sample cabinets, and dark bypasses.
entries.gt_8b681ec8f01529: Black-rust living static flows from the crack, leaving dark crumbs and yellow eye dots on the floor.
entries.gt_8bc89a48a756f3: Death by Choral Matka should read as delay: the refrain was heard, the children were not cleared, the damage window was missed.
entries.gt_8caede1bc466dc: Deep guardian of light: turns the flashlight from pure protection into bait and route risk.
entries.gt_8cde96b7c490d2: wet circuit board, pipe rings, scorched manometer, rare energy cell
entries.gt_8d0f97c27801b6: Does not leave the home room until samosbor or high anger snaps the leash; noise, theft, and fighting raise anger, while a report or helping neighbors lowers it.
entries.gt_9015bd93dfa512: wet rags, bathroom grime, rare filtering layer
entries.gt_913e75e4b75857: Storerooms, repair niches, cable and pipe cages of the Living Zone and Collectors.
entries.gt_9146ee223915fe: First remove the guards, then hit from corners between volleys: walls and columns break the Mancobus's straight sector.
entries.gt_91cc8c9eb2e52e: Food scent-lunge predator that turns food, meat, and bait into a route decision.
entries.gt_932f64e2125a1f: burned-out filament, glass dust, rare lamp or PSI dust
entries.gt_9333dc707d1f9b: Water pipe-ambusher that dictates the route through the dry edge.
entries.gt_936f63c8adeb30: Spawner-boss where the player chooses: kill the source, clear the spawn, or leave.
entries.gt_940ba2ade34fe4: Dark steel, concrete shoulders, and orange cracks; after a heavy hit the plates shed fragments.
entries.gt_94397419911d64: Dogs share a target in a small radius and press with bodies, but loud metal, a valve, a noise can, or a shotgun scares them and breaks the pack.
entries.gt_94ca29cabec906: The corridor trembles, concrete sheds fragments, a heavy figure blocks the straight route.
entries.gt_94d9574c0b4c8a: Give the garbage or common krysnozhka a small garbage-flicker frame or floor mark before the first dash.
entries.gt_94f01d95e15612: Commander heavy threat: guards plus sector ranged combat.
entries.gt_96f36b17dbb914: fatty metal, command organic matter, energy cell, bottle with a voice
entries.gt_9770868231dca0: cut metal, armor plate, rebar fragment
entries.gt_97de11c69f6627: Living and technical corridors, common rooms, and storerooms before the Meat Lower.
entries.gt_984e4939667322: Death by Olgoy-Khorkhoy should read as meat in the pocket, fighting by the pipe, or refusing bait.
entries.gt_986a891e998cc7: The office field increases range and damage near desks, cabinets, archives, and targets with papers; point blank, a cabinet, or a wall breaks the shot.
entries.gt_99be025a3a866d: Very fast, but cuts honestly: a wall, door, machine, or apparatus breaks the line, and buckshot interrupts the windup.
entries.gt_9a29012051dbc3: Rare post-samosbor shelter composite where combat, isolation, and report have equal meaning.
entries.gt_9c34be21d017c3: Wet drag-sound before a door or bathroom.
entries.gt_9d268092b4fdd5: Death by False Spirit should point to betting on a closed door instead of changing position after the draft.
entries.gt_9db73088163409: Do not open the door to the first patrol after a hard all-clear: check the mask number, hide samples in a cache, and keep distance until it reveals itself.
entries.gt_9e252eeb07f994: A white silhouette corrects distance, green light marks the mistaken route.
entries.gt_9e843115a12fcf: Death by Lishennyy should read as too long a contact with light in hand or refusing a light bait.
entries.gt_9ee90c377422e5: An open line and empty reserves lose; cover between volleys and an exit behind your back decide the fight.
entries.gt_9f722b498325f7: Death by Lotochnik should read the mistake as fighting in water without a dry threshold or leaving a wet route too late.
entries.gt_9fc33a17f7ecae: empty note, cold draft, rare PSI dust from the second person
entries.gt_9fe98979bbddde: Offices, storerooms, smoking rooms, and command rooms of the Ministry, Living Zone, Hell, and Void.
entries.gt_9fef20973ca453: Fast control web-spitter that does not gnaw health, but turns a bad corridor into a sticky trap.
entries.gt_a0259616710038: choral womb node, gray membrane, rare meat rune after a broken refrain
entries.gt_a04ec1a0aef045: Death by Betonoed should read as an unresolved weak wall, greedy shortcut, or late fire.
entries.gt_a072fa175ba6e0: Do not feed the swarm from your pocket: throw marked bait farther than yourself, lead it through a sticky trap, or break the first dash with buckshot.
entries.gt_a078c3abe88d1b: Do not let the carrier reach guards or food: expose the disease before witnesses, quarantine it, strike before the command shout, or lure it away from storerooms.
entries.gt_a0f99246fbe5f9: Death by Deep Shadow should read as chasing an afterimage into darkness without light or a held exit.
entries.gt_a2252e7a330796: Holds line and hearing; a door, corner, or column between volleys matters more than a duel.
entries.gt_a315cb91d55514: Rare heavy encounters on civilian floors, in the Collectors, Hell, and Void.
entries.gt_a3416c263a2f86: Shoot during the red flash of cracks, break the straight line with a corner, or make the dash hit a door, table, or cabinet.
entries.gt_a35c752e173a8a: A weak wall crunches from inside, dust stretches in a line along the seam until the gnaw-through.
entries.gt_a3614cecc7abb2: Pass a lampPowered cue into event data/HUD hint near Feature.LAMP without a per-frame full-world scan.
entries.gt_a364912cee2f1b: Do not stand at medium range: break the firing angle or move point blank to the immobile idol.
entries.gt_a466a5eb8e3d4b: Get out of the water: a dry edge and bridge cut the eel's dash. A harpoon hits through the trough, bait pulls it off route.
entries.gt_a4d94cfe5fc7db: While Black Slime sits in dark water, it is almost hidden; light, noise, damage, or a close step reveals the first accurate volley.
entries.gt_a5567887095439: A pale gut rises from the trough, the ring of teeth opens, blood by the pipe drains downward.
entries.gt_a5609cb84c50ac: Does not move, but holds the open medium line; a corner, door, or point blank breaks the problem.
entries.gt_a5d9824bdad3a7: Garbage kitchens, markets, storerooms, household corridors, and clogged technical corners.
entries.gt_a669045920864e: gnawed form, sour ink, empty unsigned blank
entries.gt_a6f173da0b317b: Death explains the crowd, kitchen, or door grip.
entries.gt_a712afe0c1f0df: If you drag out the fight, capped spawn fills the passage and turns retreat into a task.
entries.gt_a7dfab8673640b: Break the line to the screen, disable or smash the apparatus, do not obey a fresh order from the monitor, and use energy weapons while the avatar is detached from its source.
entries.gt_a7f90e7ebe4f7f: Death by Garbage Swarm should read as open food in the pocket, bait at your feet, or fighting without a narrow exit.
entries.gt_a8612b78eb7c03: Common, command, medical, and corridor rooms on dangerous routes of all floors.
entries.gt_a8be0da846c1b4: A thin black woman with gray hair and branching growths backs away from light and weapons.
entries.gt_a8de5ed944e309: womb node, warm slime, rare meat rune after clearing
entries.gt_a94ac1be7415a0: Keep one and a half cells, the center of the room, and reserve behind you: at the concrete edge the Beast reaches farther, and bait breaks pursuit.
entries.gt_aa766eee75a2b6: Dark-water ambush turret that punishes entering a black trough without checking.
entries.gt_ac5872c0b0ee47: Command, common, and production rooms of the Collectors, Hell, and Void.
entries.gt_ac8b2ae42cfbb0: Death by Pipe Automaton should read as standing on a wet straight line and missing the cooling window.
entries.gt_ad54276449a34a: A wet gray-pink lump hangs above the neck, tendrils holding the body like someone else's collar.
entries.gt_ae1a58106af323: A green warm-up warns of the shot: a door, corner, or column before the flash breaks the volley; after the shot you can close in.
entries.gt_ae87ba034d4449: Death by Treskotnik should read as a late shot, an open straight line, or ignoring the red flash before the dash.
entries.gt_aea57c08a502ed: Blind long-range turret that shoots at the last noise or the player's old position.
entries.gt_aed14c6e3d8b47: Death by Lamp-Eye should point to fighting under a lamp without retreat, a corner, or a switch.
entries.gt_aeea82c2c79265: Local NET avatar that makes the screen room dangerous only near the signal source.
entries.gt_af0bdf57e1418f: Hold the windup-pulse through spriteScale/HUD cue without regenerating the sprite in-frame.
entries.gt_af36fc49ba1275: Lit corridors, offices, common and production rooms before the Collectors.
entries.gt_afbe7529c82307: ashy dust, black trace, rare strange clot
entries.gt_afe15a2f6ac38d: Break line of sight with a cabinet, door, or corner and close in right after the volley: point blank, the Paragraph loses distance.
entries.gt_b04daebdde11b7: rusty slime, manometer, pipe fragment from a flooded trough
entries.gt_b0605d12bfc9b2: Long technical and meat corridors with side bypasses in the Collectors and Hell.
entries.gt_b0c74460d2be59: Corridor service automaton that closes a long wet straight line and then cools down.
entries.gt_b0c744f25ac1ea: Garbage moves and gives away the pack.
entries.gt_b0d2be45659d0a: In darkness it prepares a dash; light, a flashlight, a step back, or open space breaks the strike.
entries.gt_b132346b7ee14d: rebar crumbs, concrete shards, rare warm concrete clot
entries.gt_b18f615e5c3a51: The black figure watches even with its back, the air clicks before the PSI shot.
entries.gt_b1d00185aeb281: Office doors of the Ministry, rare living rooms, and void seams with an open bypass.
entries.gt_b24747648ec572: Blue pipe rings brighten, water along the line hums, a white core holds one axis.
entries.gt_b258b2eb956cc1: Do not let the Deadman through a crowd, kitchen, or ward: draw it into an empty passage and finish it before the first grab.
entries.gt_b2c85acb1d164c: Technical voids, abandoned kitchens after samosbor, Collector service cracks, and meat vents of the lower floors.
entries.gt_b3d196cee3c384: Do not wait behind one door: after the cold draft, move to open ground or break the phase with an accurate shot or UV.
entries.gt_b4ad47790a5605: Rare deep offices, command rooms, production rooms, and corridors of the Collectors and Void, plus terminal backlash.
entries.gt_b5445b3236e787: Cowardly bait that retreats to a dark line and strikes only for pursuit.
entries.gt_b651fab4ba14aa: Drains, pump rooms, collectors, flooded corridors, and rare living bathrooms.
entries.gt_b67126adbc3e97: Death by Carpet should read as greedy entry toward loot, fighting in a doorway, or lack of fire, salt, and filter.
entries.gt_b6c7d7f865589f: Senses open food and govnyak in the player's inventory from farther away, moves to thrown bait, and spreads into fixed flanking slots.
entries.gt_b6f99e052758ec: The neighbor walks without looking, the crowd parts too late, a grip appears at the door.
entries.gt_b73bee5812c2d8: Living samosbor pockets, hellish ash corridors, and rare smoggy route floors.
entries.gt_b7656e74f96119: cold dust, dark trace, rare strange clot from the second silhouette
entries.gt_b768771d35ea87: Death by Rebar should point to stepping onto straight metal, a wall, or a storage rack.
entries.gt_b7f675fafaa1e5: Death by Stamp-Eater should point to paper smell, an unburdened inventory, or a straight chase without corners.
entries.gt_b87a39a545924a: pocket household junk, someone else's note, rare cigarettes
entries.gt_b97a41e2b3056e: Wet rustling by the floor, heavy crawling under the door, water answers before the step.
entries.gt_b9eab1baf60a54: Do not backpedal along the wet line: a step onto dry concrete breaks the pressure; after the pause, enter with a short burst or leave the trough.
entries.gt_ba44cc917b1127: Does not hunt first, moves toward slime rooms and stains; wounded, it runs, and in a corner it strikes with a weak acid lash.
entries.gt_baec82d18bf390: Final void boss: resources, cover, and the green outline as an exam.
entries.gt_baefb969d69e80: First remove the guards and break the line with a column; a direct entry feeds volleys and encirclement.
entries.gt_bbe1f6fad2628c: Death by Matka should read as a mixed plan: the player did not kill the source, did not clear the spawn, and lost the retreat.
entries.gt_bc2ac7a6768cd4: void spike, white dust, empty protocol receipt
